_comment: A sample multi-agent orchestrator registry. Each entry is an agent your orchestrator can route a task to. 'description' is the EXACT string the selector matches on — edit these to your real registry and routeproof tells you when an edit silently breaks routing. Every agent takes one arg, `task` (the user's request, which the orchestrator always has) — that models the common pattern where the selector routes the whole task and the agent self-gathers specifics. NOTE: if your real agents declare *required* args the routing query can't supply (an id, a file path), the selector will correctly DEFER to none rather than call a tool it can't fill — that's routeproof's elicitation limitation, not a routing bug. Feed this file to the adapter: node registry-adapter.mjs agents.registry.json

tools.name: web_researcher
tools.description: Search the live web and read pages to answer questions that need current or external information the model doesn't already know.

task.description: the user's request in their own words

tools.name: code_writer
tools.description: Write new code, modify existing code, or implement a feature in an existing codebase from a plain-language description.

task.description: the user's request in their own words

tools.name: code_reviewer
tools.description: Review a diff or pull request for bugs, security issues, and style before it is merged. Does not write the change.

task.description: the user's request in their own words

tools.name: doc_summarizer
tools.description: Summarize a document, article, blog post, or transcript into its key points.

task.description: the user's request in their own words

tools.name: meeting_recap
tools.description: Summarize a meeting, call, or standup and extract the decisions made and the action items.

task.description: the user's request in their own words

tools.name: data_analyst
tools.description: Run queries and compute statistics over a dataset or spreadsheet and return the numbers.

task.description: the user's request in their own words

tools.name: email_drafter
tools.description: Draft and format an outbound email or reply in the user's voice.

task.description: the user's request in their own words

tools.name: calendar_reader
tools.description: Look up and list the user's existing calendar events and upcoming meetings. Read-only — does not create or change anything.

task.description: the user's request in their own words

tools.name: scheduler
tools.description: Schedule, create, move, or cancel calendar events and meetings with other people, and set reminders on the user's calendar.

task.description: the user's request in their own words

tools.name: translator
tools.description: Translate a piece of text from one language into another.

task.description: the user's request in their own words

tools.name: image_describer
tools.description: Describe the visual contents of an image or screenshot.

task.description: the user's request in their own words
